name: Jungle Shotcaller
short: Send repeated Jungle shotcall messages to a role.
description: Send repeated `Jungle in 30s` notifications to a role every 4.5 minutes for 30 minutes.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not store any End User Data.
install_msg: Thanks for installing Jungle Shotcaller. Load the cog with `[p]load Jungle Shotcaller` and see its commands with `[p]help Jungle Shotcaller`.
author: Cheodl
